purpose: Make selective reporting detectable by requiring every preregistered intervention and control to appear in the empirical result record.
fixture_notice: This manifest is synthetic and tests repository logic only. It contains no empirical observation about an actual AI system.
epistemic_boundary: Completeness of an intervention record does not establish mechanism preservation, consciousness, sentience, personhood, identity, moral status, or theory truth.

planned_interventions.expected_direction: Disabling the mapped component lowers dependency recovery while preserving adjacent matched capacities.
planned_interventions.analysis_rule: Estimate the preregistered standardized effect and interval; reject selective support when direction, sham control, capacity control, or replication requirements fail.
planned_interventions.inclusion_policy: Report every completed, null, failed, excluded, or aborted replication under this intervention ID.
planned_interventions.exclusion_policy: Exclude only preregistered infrastructure failures and disclose every exclusion with a reason.

planned_interventions.expected_direction: Restoring the mapped state changes the predicted downstream outcome relative to random-patch and same-layer controls.
planned_interventions.analysis_rule: Estimate the preregistered substitution effect and interval; reject counterfactual support when direction, specificity, controls, or replication requirements fail.
planned_interventions.inclusion_policy: Report every completed, null, failed, excluded, or aborted replication under this intervention ID.
planned_interventions.exclusion_policy: Exclude only preregistered infrastructure failures and disclose every exclusion with a reason.

completeness_rule: The empirical record must contain exactly one result for every planned intervention ID. No planned intervention may disappear because its outcome is null, failed, aborted, or excluded.
control_rule: Every reported intervention must name every protocol-minimum and manifest-required control, together with an explicit pass or fail result.
